2605.05878.title: Agentic, Context-Aware Risk Intelligence in the Internet of Value
2605.05878.paper_summary: The Internet of Value (IoV) is a heterogeneous, partially-trusted network in which the dominant marginal risk is composite (route, sentiment, liquidity, and the policy a system is willing to commit to) rather than a property of any single chain. We argue that a risk primitive adequate for this regime is a composition of five engines: a prediction engine over price, liquidity, volatility, and route health; a Bittensor verification subnet that decentralises and economically scores prediction outputs; a sentiment-fusion engine over text, on-chain flow, and grey-literature feeds; an agentic engine under constitutional, role-bound action constraints; and an API-risk and scenario engine that converts forecasts into pre-committed action programs in the sense of Monte-Carlo scenario generation. We anchor the architecture in two empirical artefacts: a 27-hour policy-constrained liquidity stress-response experiment on Solana, and a 168-hour prediction-router calibration arc reported with explicit class-imbalance honesty. The case study supports deployability; the validator-loss decomposition is stated formally and is falsifiable.
2605.05878.paper_summary_zh: 價值網絡（IoV）是一個異質的、部分信任的網絡，其中主導的邊際風險是綜合性的（路徑、情緒、流動性，以及系統願意承諾的政策），而不是任何單一鏈的屬性。我們認為，適合這一體系的風險原語是一個由五個引擎組成的組合：一個針對價格、流動性、波動性和路徑健康的預測引擎；一個去中心化並經濟性評分預測輸出的Bittensor驗證子網；一個針對文本、鏈上流動和灰色文獻來源的情緒融合引擎；一個在憲法、角色約束行動限制下的代理引擎；以及一個將預測轉換為預先承諾的行動計劃的API風險和情境引擎，這是在蒙特卡羅情境生成的意義下進行的。我們將架構固定在兩個實證工件上：在Solana上進行的27小時政策約束流動性壓力反應實驗，以及報告中明確類別不平衡誠實的168小時預測路由器校準弧。案例研究支持可部署性；驗證者損失分解被正式陳述並且是可證偽的。
2605.05878.author: Basel Magableh et.al.
